arts.ttl: Why is Rodrygo not playing for Real Madrid against Girona? How long is he out for?
arts.sum: Despite starting out wide, Yáñez is Juvenil A’s top scorer in the mini-Champions, with four goals in five matches. Gonzalo, who saw his streak of scoring in six consecutive matches come to an end (he is the top scorer in the Primera RFEF with 12 goals), had to be substituted in the 70th minute, replaced by Hugo de Llanos.
